start your journey in seattle before heading to the breathtaking landscapes of olympic national parks.
day one drives you through major cities like portland to reach the stunning coast.

day two takes you to yosemite national parks where you can hike among ancient redwoods.
this route passes through major cities like san francisco offering a perfect blend of urban and wild.

day three explores the majestic redwoods in monterey bay national parks while visiting santa cruz.
the drive from major cities reveals breathtaking landscapes that feel like stepping into another world.

day four heads to sequoia national parks to witness the world's largest trees in california.
you will pass through major cities like los angeles before reaching these incredible natural wonders.

day five visits yosemite national parks again for a different perspective on its granite cliffs.
the journey from major cities like san diego showcases breathtaking landscapes that inspire awe.

day six travels to the redwoods in monterey bay national parks to soak in the cool mist.
this leg of the trip from major cities highlights the diverse beauty of the west coast.

day seven concludes your adventure in seattle after exploring olympic national parks one last time.
the final drive from major cities wraps up a trip filled with breathtaking landscapes and unforgettable memories.
